---
title: "Sem_exempel"
author: "Johan"
date: '`r Sys.Date()`'
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r data, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(pxweb)
library(knitr)
source("data_vt26.R")
```

# Rubrik 1

## Rubrik 2

### Rubrik 3

```{r, echo=FALSE}
kable(head(tot_df))
```

# Plot av data

```{r,eval=FALSE}
plot(x = tot_df$Befolkning, y = tot_df$`Antal forskare`, col = "blue")
```
